name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: ''
labels: ''

---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Open file / perform action '...'
2. '....'
3. See error

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

**Log file (please attach)**
The application writes a log file on every run. Please attach it — it is the single most helpful thing you can provide.

> **Not familiar with code? Here's how to find it:**
> Open the folder where you installed or extracted AIVUS-CAA. Inside it you will find a `logs/` subfolder. The files are named `app_YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS.log` (e.g. `app_20260311_143022.log`). Attach the most recent one to this issue using the paperclip icon below the comment box.
>
> Typical locations:
> - **Windows:** `C:\Users\<YourName>\<install folder>\logs\`
> - **Linux / macOS:** `~/aivus-caa/logs/` (or wherever you extracted the archive)

**Environment (please complete the following information):**
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14]
- AIVUS-CAA version: [e.g. 1.2.0 — shown in the banner on startup]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.11.8]
- Installation method: [e.g. pip, conda, pre-built release]

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here (input file type, IVUS system/vendor, segmentation settings used, etc.).
